query: SELECT LENGTH(REPLACE(remoteJid, '@s.whatsapp.net', '')) as digits_len, COUNT(DISTINCT remoteJid) as unique_jids, COUNT(*) as total_msgs FROM messages WHERE sessionId IS NOT NULL AND remoteJid LIKE '%@s.whatsapp.net' GROUP BY digits_len ORDER BY digits_len;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT LENGTH(REPLACE(remoteJid, '@s.whatsapp.net', '')) as digits_len, COUNT(DISTINCT remoteJid) as unique_jids, COUNT(*) as total_msgs FROM messages WHERE sessionId IS NOT NULL AND remoteJid LIKE '%@s.whatsapp.net' GROUP BY digits_len ORDER BY digits_len;
